name: US Cash Advance
description_short: US Cash Advance is a Detroit payday loan and cash advance storefront offering same-day unsecured loans up to $1,000 for all credit types via third-party lenders.
description_long:
US Cash Advance operates a physical storefront at 20002 Schoolcraft Rd in Detroit, Michigan, with a corporate address listed in Charlotte, NC — indicating this is a multi-location operation rather than a locally-owned lender. The branch maintains unusually extended walk-in hours (Monday through Friday 8am–9pm, weekends 10am–7pm), making it accessible to working adults who cannot visit lenders during standard business hours. Both in-store and online applications are accepted.

The company's core products are payday loans and cash advance loans, both capped at $1,000 or less and designed for short-term emergency use. They also advertise bad credit personal loans from $250 to $50,000, same-day loans, no-credit-check loans, quick loans, cash loans, and debt consolidation. All products are unsecured — no collateral is required — and all credit types are explicitly welcomed. The five-step process involves submitting an online inquiry, being matched with a third-party lender, reviewing the offer, signing a contract, and receiving funds.

Customer reviews on the site rate the company 4.4 and specifically highlight the Detroit branch's in-store experience. One reviewer reports completing the full loan process in under 45 minutes. A named staff member (Doris) is credited in multiple reviews for explaining repayment terms clearly and maintaining a no-pressure approach. The company emphasizes minimal paperwork, no collateral, and freedom to use loan funds for any purpose.

Prospective borrowers should note that US Cash Advance functions as a loan referral platform — it connects applicants to third-party lenders rather than underwriting loans itself. This means rates and terms are set by those lenders and are not disclosed on the page; the site's APR disclosure text is truncated without providing a concrete rate range. At least one review references 'Express Payday Loans' rather than US Cash Advance by name, raising questions about the authenticity of some testimonials. Payday and cash advance products typically carry high APRs; borrowers should request a full rate disclosure before signing any agreement.
pros: Extended hours (Mon–Fri 8am–9pm, weekends 10am–7pm) accommodate working adults
In-store process reportedly completed in under 45 minutes per customer review
Accepts all credit types including bad credit and no credit history
No collateral required on any listed loan product
Physical Detroit storefront available for in-person assistance
Loan range spans $100 to $50,000 across product types
4.4 customer rating with specific staff (Doris) praised for transparent explanations
cons: Referral model: loans are funded by unnamed third-party lenders, not US Cash Advance directly — terms vary and are not disclosed upfront
APR information is absent from the location page; disclosure text is truncated before revealing rate ranges
At least one review names 'Express Payday Loans' instead of US Cash Advance, suggesting templated or shared review content
Contact email uses a staging/development domain (kinsta.cloud) rather than a professional business address
No online pre-approval option noted by a customer reviewer; in-person visit currently required to complete the process
best_for: Detroit-area borrowers needing small emergency loans ($100–$1,000) same day
Consumers with bad or no credit who have been declined by traditional lenders
People who prefer in-person guidance through the loan process
Borrowers with evening or weekend availability who cannot visit standard business-hours lenders
diagnosis: US Cash Advance is best suited for Detroit-area borrowers who need small emergency cash ($100–$1,000) quickly and have poor or no credit. Because it operates as a third-party lender referral service with no APR ranges disclosed on the site, borrowers must carefully review the specific lender's offer — including full rate and fee disclosures — before signing any agreement.
services: In-store loan processing at Detroit branch
